top_recommendation: Before signing, request an exhibit that includes specific service level commitments (uptime percentage, support response times) and verify the provider's security certifications meet your compliance requirements, especially if handling sensitive customer or financial data.

DO NOT SIGN this agreement as written. This contract is extraordinarily one-sided and exposes your company to significant financial and legal risk while providing almost no protection or flexibility. Request a complete redraft using a balanced template, or walk away and find a different vendor with reasonable standard terms.

Negotiate to add standard exceptions to the definition of Confidential Information (publicly available, independently developed, lawfully obtained from third parties, previously known) and either remove the non-solicitation clause entirely or significantly narrow its scope to senior executives only for 1 year maximum.

This is a clean, balanced consulting agreement with minimal risk. Proceed with focus on ensuring each Statement of Work contains specific deliverables, timelines, and success criteria to avoid scope disputes.
Negotiate a 30-day cure period before termination and add minimum warranties that the software will substantially conform to its documentation and be free of material defects
